title: SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION - 211info
text: LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NORTHWEST YAMHILL COUNTY SAFE ROUTE IMMIGRATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides assistance with lawful permanent residency (Green Card), visa services, assistance in acquiring passports including passport photos, asylum services, translation and notary services, travel documents and re-entry permits, and other legal services. 435 NE Evans Street Suite A McMinnville, OR 97128 Eligibility: Individuals who are refugees, asylees, or immigrants Hours: Monday-Thursday 8am-5pm, Friday by appointment Email (503) 472-4020 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 472-4020 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call, email, or walk in for information. Pre-screening takes 30-45 minutes. FEES: Varies by service DOCUMENTS: Varies by service LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Yamhill County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4pm Services: Immigration/Naturalization Legal Services Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - COLLABORATIVE HOME SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES OREGON INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING EDUCATION GROUPS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SAFE FAMILIES FOR CHILDREN MENTAL HEALTH ASSESSMENT AND TREATMENT - LUTHERAN COMMUNITY SERVICES NW MCMINNVILLE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
